asset_name: Echo Affection and Rest Sheet — happy, preening, sleeping, singing
shared_properties: Uses the locked 40x40 front-facing cockatiel body plan.
Maintains the bright orange body and pink cheek identity in every state.
Animation timing stays gentle and readable for a healing pet-game tone.
differences: This sheet covers reward, rest, and self-care expressions.
Feed and discomfort cues stay in the core behavior sheet.

reference_images.label: proxy_character_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Proxy sprite reference for keeping the alternate bird poses inside the established silhouette envelope.

reference_images.label: proxy_pixel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Proxy moodboard for preserving calm animation pacing and warm color readability.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/pico_echo/trial_5/character_echo_affection_rest_sheet_20f.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under character_echo_affection_rest_sheet_20f.
runtime_notes: Create a 5x4 TextureAtlasLayout and keep the state ranges aligned to the documented happy, preening, sleeping, and singing slices.
Swap to this sheet only after the core sheet has established idle and care-critical states.
Reserve headroom near the upper-right corner for hearts, ZZZ, and notes while the sprite stays anchored in the same world slot.

context.usage: Companion sheet for affection feedback, sleep cycle, preening, and high-happiness singing moments.

effect_hooks: Happy frames leave 4px headroom for heart particles.
Sleeping frames leave 6px right-side space for ZZZ glyphs.
Singing frames open the beak and reserve upper-right space for note icons.

shape.silhouette: 40x40 cockatiel using the core crest, cheek patch, beak, torso, and tail footprint, with pose shifts only inside the existing outline envelope.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 200x160px with five columns and four rows of 40x40 frames.
Happy, preening, sleeping, and singing ranges use the documented frame counts with no overlap.
Sleeping state shows the head tucked into feathers and leaves readable room for a 3x3 ZZZ cue.
Singing state reads as high-energy with a raised crest and open beak at 1x scale.
